discussion_comments.comment_body: Can you use the colors from the themes variables in this file?
I think you'll also need to manually update this to scss
updated how --base-font works.  now just write `font: var(--base-font)` and you get the font-family, size, weight, etc.

i think all of these `color` classes should be combined into app.less.  we already have rules for .icon.color-X in there that will set the path fill color.  just add the `i { color: ...}` rules there as well.  (i think we also need color-default there as well).  then maybe add the `icon` class to your renderIcon output and we'll be set and can remove all of these duplicate classes.
this should be 15px (Martian Mono font is optimized for 12.5px and 15px -- 2.5px steps)
This is set here so that the size of the fontawesome icon matches that of the custom SVGs in the other sidebar items. This does not change the text font sizing
